tasks.title: Build the normalization key
tasks.description: Collapse casing and surrounding whitespace so that equal contacts hash to one key.
tasks.details: Add normalize_key(email, phone) that lowercases and strips both fields and returns them as a tuple. Route every row in import_contacts.py through it before deciding whether to insert.
tasks.testStrategy: Run the unit suite over mixed-case fixtures; every casing and padding variant of a single contact must collapse to the same key.

subtasks.title: Write normalize_key with mixed-case unit tests
subtasks.description: Implement the key function and cover it with fixtures that vary casing and whitespace.
subtasks.details:
Implemented the lowercase-and-strip key and added 15 fixtures.
<info added on 2026-07-09T14:22:05Z>
All 15 unit tests pass. Uppercase, title-case, and space-padded variants of one contact now map to a single key.
</info>

tasks.title: Make the import idempotent
tasks.description: Skip inserts whose key already exists and prove a second import adds nothing.
tasks.details: Track seen keys in a set; on a collision count the skip instead of inserting. Re-running the import must leave the row count unchanged.
tasks.testStrategy: Import the two sample files and assert 41 unique rows from 57 input rows; run the import a second time and assert 0 new rows.

subtasks.title: Guard the insert on a seen-key set
subtasks.description: Count skips on collision and verify a re-run is a no-op.
subtasks.details:
Guarded the insert path on a seen-key set.
<info added on 2026-07-09T15:04:41Z>
The first import produced 41 unique contacts from 57 rows. A second run inserted 0 rows, confirming idempotency.
</info>

tasks.title: Log dropped duplicates
tasks.description: Record every dropped duplicate with its source file and line number.
tasks.details: When a row is skipped, append a line to dedupe.log naming the source file, the source line number, and the key it duplicated.
tasks.testStrategy: After an import, confirm dedupe.log lists all dropped rows and that each recorded source line number resolves to a real input row.

subtasks.title: Append dropped rows to dedupe.log
subtasks.description: Write one audit line per skipped row and spot-check it against the inputs.
subtasks.details:
Appended each skipped row to dedupe.log.
<info added on 2026-07-09T15:39:12Z>
dedupe.log recorded all 16 dropped rows (57 minus 41) with source file and line number. Three entries were spot-checked against the input files and matched.
</info>

metadata.description: Master tag for the csv-dedupe import fix
